commands.review_summary:
The PR splits subagent requester wake delivery from visible message-tool delivery, recording visible completion failure metadata while treating the requester handoff as delivered.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main tests and delivery code show stale group/channel message-tool failures return delivered=false and flow into pendingFinalDelivery retry behavior. I did not run the PR’s runtime path in a real channel setup.
commands.review_followup: This needs maintainer review of delivery semantics and contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not an automated repair branch.

target.title: fix(subagents): preserve requester wake on visible delivery failure
target.body:
## Summary
- split requester wake success from visible message-tool delivery status for subagent completions
- treat requester-agent handoff as delivered when it runs but fails to produce required message-tool output, while recording `visibleDeliveryStatus: failed`
- persist visible completion delivery failure details on subagent run records without leaving the terminal result in pending final delivery retry state

## Why
For group/channel subagent completions, visible replies must still go through the message tool. When that visible delivery fails, the requester/parent wake should remain visible to orchestration instead of becoming a passive `pendingFinalDelivery` dead letter. This keeps the safety policy intact while preserving parent continuation.

## Tests
- `CI=true corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry-lifecycle.test.ts -t 'preserves requester wake|records visible delivery|records requester wake separately'`\n- `corepack pnpm format:check src/agents/subagent-announce-dispatch.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.ts src/agents/subagent-registry-lifecycle.ts src/agents/subagent-registry.types.ts src/agents/subagent-registry-run-manager.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts src/agents/subagent-registry-lifecycle.test.ts`\n- `git diff --check`\n- `corepack pnpm tsgo:core`\n- `corepack pnpm tsgo:core:test`\n\n## Notes\n- A broader full-file Vitest run reached 167/168 passing but timed out in an existing Telegram failure-path test that waits out the announce retry timeout.\n- Plain `tsc --noEmit` exhausted Node heap on this checkout; `tsgo` checks passed instead.
target.author: dolencluka
